result: Completed architecture design for Review Compression System. Produced structured plan artifact at docs/json/opencode/plans/review-compression-schema-and-engine.v1.json with 4 schema designs, comparison engine architecture, weight rubric specification, manifest generator design, and phased delivery plan (4 phases across schema creation → engine implementation → tool → CLI). All 7 smoking guns from cartography addressed in design decisions and risk mitigations.
